title: Coffey
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
The '''''Coffey''''' was a [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] that the [[Nharwaak]] used to escort the corvette ''[[Glazer]]'' as it made a technology delivery to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|Nebulon-B frigate]] [[Fury (EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate)|''Xerxes'']]. As with the other Nharwaak craft, near [[Mylok IV]] the ''Coffey'' came under attack by [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces under [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Demetrius Zaarin]].

{{Ship-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Empire at War]]''
*''[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption]]''
